zh.Fulwood, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Fulwood Baron of Clay Hall於1355年出生在英國瓦維其可爾比米加姆時，他的父親Robertus de Fulwood30歲，母親Lady Alice Woodward25歲。他於1395年與Lady Joan Sidenhall Baroness在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Fulwood Baron of Clay Hall于1355年出生在英国瓦維其可爾比米加姆时，他的父亲Robertus de Fulwood30岁，母亲Lady Alice Woodward25岁。他于1395年与Lady Joan Sidenhall Baroness在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾比米加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fulwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fullwood
meanings: English (Midlands): habitational name from a lost place called Fulwood near Clay Hall in Tanworth in Arden, Warwickshire or from one or more of the other places so called, such as Fulwood in Ecclesall (Yorkshire), Fulwood (Lancashire), Fulwood in Sutton in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), and Fullwood Farm in Hulland (Derbyshire). From Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + wudu ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Fulwood Baron of Clay Hall was born in 1355, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robertus de Fulwood, was 30 and his mother, Lady Alice Woodward, was 25. He married Lady Joan Sidenhall Baroness in 1395, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1415, in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 60.

Il a épousé Lady Joan Sidenhall Baroness en 1395, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1415, à Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Fulwood Baron of Clay Hall(이)가 1355년 영국 워윅실르 비밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robertus de Fulwood(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Woodward(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 비밍함에서 Lady Joan Sidenhall Baroness(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 영국 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Fulwood Baron of Clay Hall родился в 1355 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robertus de Fulwood было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Woodward, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Sidenhall Baroness в 1395 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1415 г. в местности варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
